data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. LA DAMA won two back at Gore Raceway from a nice gate. Drew a wide gate last start and was never a genuine threat, beaten 6 metres into fifth at Phar Lap Racecourse over 2100m. Meets a similar line up and she can figure in the finish. 13. FLORENCE THE MACHINE ran seventh last start at Addington over 1980m, beaten 30 metres. Expected to run well. 14. HAIL MARY is better than her first-up eighth over 2000m at Addington six days ago. Each-way chance .2. JACCKA ACE is in the mix following a fourth at his most recent appearance over 2400m at this track.","runners":[5,13,14,2],"exclusive":false}
